steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0024_port_de_rosenroll_2026_dsgc branch from main and plan steps.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0008, t0012, t0022 are completed and fetch their outputs.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize task folder scaffold (assets, code, data, results, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review existing paper corpus for DSGC models, Nav1.6/Nav1.2 AIS split, and modern Kv/Cav formulations informing the port.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Locate the de Rosenroll et al. 2026 paper, publisher/preprint venue, and any accompanying NEURON source code or ModelDB entry.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0008 HOC/MOD layout, t0012 scoring library, and t0022 driver infrastructure for reuse.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the library asset, driver, tuning-curve protocol, scoring glue, and contingency if source code is unavailable.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: no remote compute needed; NEURON runs on the local Windows workstation like t0008.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement the de_rosenroll_2026_dsgc library asset, driver, run tuning-curve sweep, and score against target envelope.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote compute to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical code-reproduction port; no exploratory reinterpretation required.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json with tuning curves and scoring outputs.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare de Rosenroll 2026 port metrics against Poleg-Polsky lineage (t0008, t0020, t0022) and Hanson port (t0023) plus published envelope.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions based on port outcomes and cross-model comparison.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run pre-merge verificator, open PR, merge to main, and refresh overview/.
